subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the divine Tree of the All-Merciful! The letter which thou didst address to his honor Ismu'llah [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع النجیب من الشجره الرحمانیه تحریری که بحضرت اسم الله مرقوم نموده
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @growth of the Cause
